creator: ryo2@on.rim.or.jp
text:
fvwm95-2.0.43a port updated by applying an internationalized patch
    was put as an archive fvwm95-2.0.43a-i18n-port.tar.gz to
    ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/ although I'm not sure
    whether this should be handled as a new port.
    Thinking about current fvwm2 port is i18n, it may be an upgrade.
